title: Reds Extra Tools N Stuff
description:
Adds some new tools, materials, armor, and more!

There are OP but insanely hard to get tools and armor, as well as tungsten, which will be like diamond tools and armor with the durability of Neterite while being more easy to get! This mod is in beta
body:
# What this mod adds:

This mod adds new materials, tools, and armor to the game. This mod adds tungsten to the game, which is a middle ground between diamond and netherite. It has the attack power / efficiency of dimand, but the durability of netherite, and is found in the overworld. as of the first relese, there is only a sword for the tungsten tools. This mod also adds the ultimate tools / armor, which is greatly overpowered for minecraft. They are also insanely difficult and time consuming to get which makes netherite look like child's play. 

### The Ultimate Sword:

- This sword can kill the warden with seven hits without enchantments
- Right-clicking a block spawns blue fire
- Over twice the durability of netherite

### The Ultimate Pickaxe:

- This pickaxe mines a 3x3x3 area 
- Has the best efficiency out of any tool
- gives the user jump-boost for better cave navagation
- Over twice the durability of netherite

### The Ultimate Armor:

- Has more protection than netherite
- 100% knockback reduction
- Over twice the durability of netherite
- Wearing full set gives resistance IV and fire resistance

# What is this odd mod for?

This mod is for being merged with other mods. The ultimate toolset would look a lot less powerful compaired to the Wither Storm for example. In later updates after the initial relese, there will be a new dimension with new mobs and items, not only expanding on the current tools, but adding some sort of challange even with the insane "Ultimate" tools / armor.

# Plans after initial relese:
- Finish tungsten toolset & armor
- Add a Ultimate Axe
- Add a new dimension
- Add new mobs
- Add unique armor / tool upgrade system for the ultimate toolset / armor
